preflight.note: off-camera: the page loads sidebar-collapsed then JS applies the profile persisted preference (~1-2s later). Settle before the railToggle normalization so the unless-check + press act on the settled state (a blind early click can over-toggle an already-expanded sidebar and fail its sidebarExpanded postcondition).

off-camera: stage the persisted shared sidebar preference expanded before the take (the rail panel toggle is the same control both ways; probe-verified July 11, aside width 220 when expanded on both the list and the detail shell). Skipped when already expanded. The Team rail lists the Employees group pages directly (no collapsible sub-group), so no group toggle is needed.
